label: Room requirement (has assigned throne, any of)
description: Requires the room to contain a throne of any of the listed types that is assigned to the role pawn.

labelKey.label: Label key
labelKey.description: Translation key for the room requirement label.

disablingPrecepts.label: Disabling precepts
disablingPrecepts.description: Precepts that disable this room requirement.

things.label: Things
things.description: Throne things; the pawn must have one of these assigned in the room.
